findings.location: ocr/page_311.md lines 7 and 26 — stylized callout banners
findings.trace: Same callout misread pattern as p217: decorative banner text 'コレが' rendered as 'つしが' by OCR. Appears twice on this page (two separate callout boxes). Not propagated to structured translated output or release output/pages/page_311.md which contains only the section header and figure caption.
findings.recommended_fix: Apply global OCR post-correction rule: 'つしが出る' → 'コレが出る' in callout banners. Affects at minimum p217 and p311; recommend full-corpus grep.
